author: Haroen Viaene
subject: refactor(examples): replace react-scripts with parcel (#5369)
body:
* refactor(examples): replace react-scripts with parcel

the main reason is that react-scripts version here is quite outdated, and causing some duplications and useless packages in our lockfile/node_modules

* chore(babel): use strings in config so parcel can cache better

this also removes all presets, as parcel already handles them (and gives a big warning if you don't)

* fix(examples): jest config for babel

* !fixup

* !fixup

* chore(storybook): install babel config for react app

* fix bundling

* chore(examples): update browserslist with same as E2E tests
